highlighted_experiments.summary: Shop에서 Orbs로 아이템을 교환할 때 주문을 먼저 만들고 확정하는 흐름을 시험합니다.
evidence: Canary modules 99029 and 715054 read the experiment in the payment and Orbs checkout modals.
The enabled path creates an order, signs it, and polls order entitlements.
The disabled path calls the legacy direct virtual-currency redemption flow.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 영상 통화 화면에서 프로필 테마 색상을 참가자 타일 배경에 반영하는 실험입니다.
evidence: Canary module 334557 reads enabled at VideoBackground-web.
When enabled and profile colors exist, the tile uses profileThemeStyle and fetches the profile.
Current web code does not consume chatInputFloating or chatInputLegacySendButton.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 결제 화면에서 주문을 먼저 만들고 결제 수단 변경 내용을 같은 주문에 반영하는 실험입니다.
evidence: Canary module 99029 reads the experiment at payment_modal.
The enabled path creates a draft order before continuing checkout.
A checkout effect updates the order when payment source information changes.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 앱 전반의 글자 스타일을 새 디자인 기준에 맞춰 바꾸는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 258599 reads the experiment at RootThemeContextProvider.
The root provider adds mana-type-consolidation to enabledExperiments when enabled.
A shared typography mapper remaps legacy text variants when that enabled experiment is present.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 완료한 Quest 보상을 Quest Home에서 바로 수령하도록 안내하는 흐름을 조정하는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 795965 registers the experiment and reads it with useConfig.
The enabled path is gated on a completed but unclaimed quest before opening the claim flow.
The same handler can route already-claimed Shop rewards toward the Orbs tab.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 음성 채널 활동 목록에서 민감하게 분류된 활동을 기본 목록과 분리하는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 933958 reads the experiment in embedded_activity_store.
When enabled, getItems("visible") filters out entries whose contentClassification is sensitive.
The same store keeps a hidden list for filtered entries.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 이모지와 사운드보드 선택기의 Nitro 안내 버튼 스타일을 바꾸는 실험입니다.
evidence: Canary module 754998 returns buttonVariant through useConfig.
Emoji picker passes the value as subscribeButtonVariantOverride for emoji_picker_floating_upsell.
Soundboard picker passes the same value for soundboard_floating_upsell.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 데스크톱에서 선물 횟수에 따라 프로필 선물 배지를 안내하는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 284518 reads the web experiment for gifting badge availability.
The availability check also requires prior premium history and an undismissed coachmark.
String history adds Gifting Badge, View on profile, Send a gift, and progress copy on 2026-07-01.

highlighted_experiments.summary: Nitro 탭의 맞춤 혜택 배지 모양과 안내 방식을 바꾸는 실험입니다.
evidence: Canary module 456346 reads the experiment at NitroTabButton.
badgeStyle selects gradient, expressive, or glowing offer badges.
surface controls whether the offer uses no surface, a popover, or a tooltip.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 월간 Nitro 사용자에게 연간 플랜 전환 안내를 어디에 보여줄지 바꾸는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 205483 reads the experiment through useConfig.
Variants map to Nitro Home tile, sticky bar, and Nitro tab popover placements.
The same module computes annual-plan savings for active monthly subscriptions.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 브라질 결제 화면에서 Pix 결제 추가 버튼을 보여주는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 319668 reads the experiment at CheckoutStatefulPayWithPixLink.
The button appears only for Brazil currency flows without an existing PIX payment source.
String history adds the user-facing “Pay with Pix” copy for the same timestamp.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 사운드보드 선택기 팝아웃을 더 크게 보여주는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 690661 reads extraHeightPx through useConfig.
The popout style becomes height: 420 + extraHeightPx when not embedded in the expression picker.
The current variant adds 100 px to the picker height.

highlighted_experiments.summary: 일부 서버에서 대화 주제 탐색 기능을 보여줄지 정하는 실험입니다.
evidence: canary/web.b267176293a4bbfc.js module 828488 registers the guild experiment and reads it through getConfig/useConfig.
The consumer checks guild conversation-processing and summaries feature flags before returning enabled.
The public row is a guild experiment named Topical Navigation.
FAMILY_CENTER_CONNECTION_PREREQUISITES API rows
ENDPOINT_USERS_PARENTAL_CONSENT_WARNING API row
guardian connection and QR/link strings through 2026-07-02
non_experiment_changes.summary: Guardian connection copy became more explicit about account access, activity visibility, QR/link sharing, and age requirements.

evidence: Gifting Badge strings on 2026-07-01
2026-06-gifting-badge-desktop experiment consumer
non_experiment_changes.summary: Large string additions describe a profile badge that levels up as users send gifts, with profile viewing and progress copy.

evidence: ORDER_ENTITLEMENTS API rows
Pix payment strings
Orbs redemption item-copy changes
non_experiment_changes.summary: Checkout work clustered around order entitlements, Orbs item redemption wording, and a Pix payment-source add path.

evidence: GUILD_ROOM_CONNECT/DISCONNECT/UPDATE API rows
Game Invites strings around voice chat posts
non_experiment_changes.summary: Guild Rooms endpoints and Game Invites strings point to more structured voice/social play surfaces, though some related experiments still lack direct linkage.

evidence: REGISTER_INCODE_INTERVIEW API rows
guardian access warning strings
non_experiment_changes.summary: Age verification and regional guardian requirements continued to add user-facing copy and API support.

evidence: Server Tag Name, Choose Badge, color/reset strings
Linked Roles deprecation/migration strings
non_experiment_changes.summary: Server tag customization copy and linked-role migration notices changed, but the mobile-server-tag experiment still lacks a confirmed config consumer.

validations.name: json_validity
validations.details: history, latest, public web JSON, and report JSON parsed successfully.

validations.name: forbidden_fallback_phrase_search
validations.details: No banned generic analysis phrases were found in public data or reports.

validations.name: public_report_sensitivity_search
validations.details: No credential-like markers or local implementation details were found in public report files.

validations.name: git_diff_check
validations.details: Whitespace and patch sanity checks passed before commit.

commits.details: Commit and push are attempted after the report validation step.
